message:
fix(dolt): keep repo-local auto-started servers alive across commands

Distinguish test-owned auto-started servers (which should be stopped on
Close) from normal repo-local helpers (which should persist like an
explicit bd dolt start). This avoids endpoint churn and circuit-breaker
trips between sequential bd commands.

- Add shouldStopAutoStartedServerOnClose() gating on BEADS_TEST_MODE
  and test database names
- Add autoStartAcquireExisting() for test refcount sharing
- Only track auto-started servers for cleanup in test contexts
- E2E integration test verifies server persists across commands

Supersedes #2655.

Co-Authored-By: matt wilkie <maphew@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Gary <gary@algorune.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
